final_output:
In cards of fate we lay our dreams so brightly unfurled on display (verse one)  
The mystic whispers guide through night and day, a truthful tale to sway us wild with insight in every way   
Spirits high-rising as the sun meets its rise above all sky. Tarot is life’s intricate dance that shows why we're here today (verse two)  
Thrinqk

rex.content:
"From cards that spin and shatter to meanings that seem impossible,
Tarot's secrets whisper in every corner of our minds.
With each card we uncover her hidden stories,
And when she falls, like a broken heart or a lost soul."
